data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of blocking entry when the weekly allowance is exceeded. However, the evidence does not demonstrate that the system effectively tracks time usage or enforces the 10-hour limit, which is critical for this requirement. The linked use case describes the expected behavior, but there is no concrete evidence showing the enforcement mechanism, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence showing time tracking and enforcement of the 10-hour weekly limit.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
